name: Chinese Barbaque Pork (Char Siew)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the pork into strips approximately 1 1/2 inches thick, 5-6 inches long, and 1/2 inch wide.
2. Combine all the ingredients for the sauce in a bowl and mix well.
3. Marinate the pork strips in the sauce for at least 2 hours.
4. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Place the marinated pork on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake the pork in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, turning it over halfway through the cooking time.
7. Continue baking the pork for another 25 minutes until cooked through and caramelized.
